Over generations, domestic yaks grew weaker and less resistant to disease, and herders now seek to strengthen their genes.

programme.desc: In 1981, the newly built and unsinkable rescue boat RF2 sinks on an early mission, killing nine. Henrik, son of the captain blamed for the disaster, must investigate amidst resistance from fishermen fearing job losses and authorities dreading scandal.

programme.title: Six Points About Emma
programme.desc: Blind and almost thirty, Emma is desperate to become a mother. She breaks up with her infertile boyfriend and sets out to find the perfect sperm donor without love or emotion, but soon discovers that it is not just her eyes which are blind.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Keep Going
programme.desc: Sybille is a divorced mother seeking to reconnect with her violent drifting son, Samuel. As a last resort, she takes him on a horse trip across Kyrgyzstan, facing its magnificent yet hostile natural environment, its people… and above all each other.

programme.title: Young Tiger
programme.desc: Illegally smuggled into France to work, 15-year-old Many is unexpectedly placed in school and a foster home. Years later, thriving in the French Sikh community, Many faces a moral dilemma arising from his ties to his family in his home country.

programme.title: The Pont D'Arc Murders
programme.desc: Two investigators with a painfully linked past are forced to team up to solve a mysterious murder which involves a carved stone dating back more than 40,000 years. They soon discover that the very thing that connects them might just solve the case.

programme.title: Cortina Express
programme.desc: During the Christmas holidays in Cortina, a colorful cast of characters cross paths among the snow-capped Ampezzo mountains. Between love, redemption, and second-chances, their lives collide in a series of hilarious and heartfelt quests for a happy ending

programme.title: Black As The Snow 2: Dead At The Summit
programme.desc: An SUV races over the cliffs into the depths - the driver is killed instantly. The dead man was apparently involved in a robbery but there is no trace of the loot. French Officer Vivier and Swiss Captain Meyer once again team up to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Governance
programme.desc: Renzo, a brilliant and unscrupulous manager is forced to quit his position as general manager of an oil group after an investigation for corruption. Convinced that a young colleague betrayed him, he plots his revenge, but the situation gets out of hand.

programme.title: Toubab
programme.desc: Soon after being released from prison, Babtou gets in trouble with the law again. Facing deportation to his foreign birthplace he’s never been to, he and his friend Dennis are willing to do anything to stay in the only home they've ever known: Frankfurt.

programme.title: Six Points About Emma
programme.desc: Blind and almost thirty, Emma is desperate to become a mother. She breaks up with her infertile boyfriend and sets out to find the perfect sperm donor without love or emotion, but soon discovers that it is not just her eyes which are blind.

programme.title: Keep Going
programme.desc: Sybille is a divorced mother seeking to reconnect with her violent drifting son, Samuel. As a last resort, she takes him on a horse trip across Kyrgyzstan, facing its magnificent yet hostile natural environment, its people… and above all each other.

programme.title: Diana's Wedding
programme.desc: Through the eyes of Diana, we witness the rollercoaster ride of both her parent’s and Irene’s marriages. To both girls, they have the worst parents in the world. But at the end of the day, which of the couples remain strong and which fall apart ?

programme.title: The Pont D'Arc Murders
programme.desc: Two investigators with a painfully linked past are forced to team up to solve a mysterious murder which involves a carved stone dating back more than 40,000 years. They soon discover that the very thing that connects them might just solve the case.

programme.title: The Pont D'Arc Murders
programme.desc: Two investigators with a painfully linked past are forced to team up to solve a mysterious murder which involves a carved stone dating back more than 40,000 years. They soon discover that the very thing that connects them might just solve the case.

programme.title: Wajma, An Afghan Love Story
programme.desc: In conservative Kabul, young Wajma discovers she is pregnant out of wedlock. Her boyfriend denies paternity and her father locks her up for being a disgrace. Driven by desperation, Wajma takes extreme measures forcing everyone to re-think their actions.

programme.title: Cortina Express
programme.desc: During the Christmas holidays in Cortina, a colorful cast of characters cross paths among the snow-capped Ampezzo mountains. Between love, redemption, and second-chances, their lives collide in a series of hilarious and heartfelt quests for a happy ending

programme.title: Bad Investigate
programme.desc: A corrupt cop sets out to hunt down a dangerous drug dealer who is seeking revenge for the death of his brother. Also trying to catch the same criminal is an FBI agent.

programme.title: Governance
programme.desc: Renzo, a brilliant and unscrupulous manager is forced to quit his position as general manager of an oil group after an investigation for corruption. Convinced that a young colleague betrayed him, he plots his revenge, but the situation gets out of hand.

programme.title: Black As The Snow
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the rampage in the ski resort of Morzine-Avoriaz. Vivier, French police officer teams up with the Swiss policeman Meyer to investigate the suspicious deaths of teenagers. They must find the killer before the victim list grows.

programme.title: Black As The Snow 2: Dead At The Summit
programme.desc: An SUV races over the cliffs into the depths - the driver is killed instantly. The dead man was apparently involved in a robbery but there is no trace of the loot. French Officer Vivier and Swiss Captain Meyer once again team up to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: 180 Degree Rule
programme.desc: Sara, a schoolteacher from Tehran, is preparing to attend a wedding in northern Iran with her family. When her husband suddenly forbids her from going, she hatches a plan to go in secret. But her choice soon places her on a painful path to atonement.

programme.title: SAF
programme.desc: Desperate, Kamil takes a low wage job in Istanbul's urbanization project. In so doing, he displaces a Syrian refugee and partakes in his neighborhood’s destruction, while also needing to pay for the required permits. One day, Kamil suddenly disappears.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Food Art Souper Nourish Bundle Set
programme.desc: No-Cook, delicious and nourishing soup that is conveniently accessible for everyone 味美清甜的免煮滋补汤，让每个人都能随时随地轻松养生！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - IRIS OHYAMA Dust Mite Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Powerful, lightweight dust mite vacuum with a smart indicator light for easy monitoring and dust mites removal up to 98%. 强力轻便的尘螨吸尘器，配有智能指示灯，方便监控，尘螨去除率高达98%。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Imperial Japanese Abalone & Buddha Jumps Over the Wall
programme.desc: Elevate your dishes this Lunar New Year with superior quality Japanese abalone and scallop, in braised sauce made with old hens stewed for 72 hours. Alternatively, enjoy the abalone in brine, which is a perfect addition to soups. The Buddha Jumps Over The Wall contains 5 premium ingredients including Sea Cucumber, Abalone, and Fish Maw. Simply warm the bowl in hot water, and it is ready to serve! 在这个农历新年，以优质日本鲍鱼与干贝为佳肴增添奢华风味，再搭配以老母鸡72 小时熬制而成的浓郁卤汁，滋味醇厚。另外还有盐水浸制的优质日本鲍鱼，是加入汤品的理想选择。 佛跳墙含有五种上乘食材：海参、鲍鱼、响螺片、花胶、干贝。只需将碗放入热水中加热，即可享用——方便快捷！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ultimo Kleen 5-in-1 Laundry Pods
programme.desc: Say goodbye to measuring and mess – simply toss in this laundry pod and let it do the rest! 完美结合洗衣、消毒、柔软、除臭及芳香剂的5合1浓缩洗衣凝珠

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Pro 2-in-1 Humidifier and Purifier
programme.desc: When Hazelle walks into an empty office, she discovers a full-blown flu outbreak! Find out how Hazelle uses the 2-in-1 Humidifier and Purifier to fight back against stale air, germs, and dry office conditions. 当 Hazelle 走进空荡荡的办公室时，竟发现同事们全军覆没！ 快来看 Hazelle 如何用这台二合一加湿净化机，对抗干燥空气、细菌和闷热的办公室环境.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ErgoLuxe Ergonomic Chair v2
programme.desc: What starts as another chaotic workday turns into a full-blown chair investigation! From posture analysis to ergonomic upgrades, Zeliang's on a mission to save Hazelle (and her spine) from bad office habits. Discover how a few smart adjustments and one seriously comfy chair can make every hour at your desk feel a whole lot lighter! 今天的办公室，不只是打工日，而是一场"椅子侦查"！泽亮化身CSI专家，检查Hazelle从颈项到腰椎的"犯罪现场" 一场笑料背后，其实藏着打工人久坐的真实痛点。跟着他们一起学几招，让坐班族也能轻松舒适过每一天！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Fissler Cookware Set
programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! Farhan now questions if Nur actually loves him.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 6
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Dialog - EP 3
programme.desc: The Ramadan Bazaar has become a culture among the Malay Muslim community every time the holy month arrives. Today it's not just a place to buy and sell, it has become a place where people of various races meet to create a shared heritage that changes according to the needs of each generation. But with all the changes and pressure on business costs, are the Ramadan Bazaars still Cheap and Lively?

programme.title: Riuh-Riuh Ramadan S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Hashims household spirals into more chaos. Kassim and Rogayah struggle with eating oats for pre dawn meal, Muna’s outburst goes viral, Mahmud’s manager ambitions escalate, and Rogayah’s impulsive bazaar shopping turns into food wastage. Meanwhile, Kassim’s livestream fame grows, inspiring Hashim to open his own social-media account. Rogayah’s simple iftar unexpectedly transforms the entire living room into a full-blown themed feast.
